final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for OPPO Find X9 Pro smartphone, a brand exposure campaign with visual impact priority.

Style/medium: commercial product poster, bold graphic design with high contrast, tech-lifestyle aesthetic
Composition: full-screen smartphone mockup centered, slight 3/4 angle to show screen depth, generous padding for brand breathing room
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Pro smartphone with edge-to-edge display, sleek metallic frame, reflective glass back
Scene/backdrop: abstract gradient or studio backdrop, minimal to keep focus on device
Lighting/mood: dramatic studio lighting with soft rim light, premium and aspirational mood
Color palette: deep blacks and metallic silvers as base, vibrant accent glow from screen, OPPO brand green as subtle highlight
Materials/textures: brushed aluminum frame, polished glass surface with subtle reflection, matte screen with UI glow
Text (verbatim): "OPPO Find X9 Pro"
Constraints: must work at 1080×1920 vertical format; brand name must be prominent and legible; visual hierarchy prioritizes device over text
Avoid: cluttered backgrounds, generic stock photo aesthetic, over-processed HDR look, watermarks, distracting UI elements on screen
